title.en: The Binary Bloom of the Technosphere

description.ko: 생물학적 구조와 디지털 코드가 미래의 천상 정원에서 하나로 합쳐지는 하이브리드 식물 개체입니다.
description.en: A hybrid botanical entity where biological structures and digital code merge in an ethereal garden of the future.

prompt: A hyper-macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a sentient 'Data-Lily' whose petals are made of #89CFF0 fiber-optic glass and #50C878 emerald circuit board leaves. The flower's core is a glowing holographic orb emitting #FFB6C1 fractal pollen particles into a dark #4A0E4E velvet void. Floating binary code droplets cling to the translucent petals. 8k resolution, photorealistic fusion of organic nature and advanced cybernetic technology, volumetric lighting, synthwave aesthetic.
